title: View Tipper Alarms And Timestamps On the Visu_Alarm Screen
summary: Use the Operator Station HMI Visu_Alarm screen to view the list of tipper alarms and the timestamp shown with each alarm.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when an operator needs to inspect the Operator Station HMI Visu_Alarm screen to see the tipper alarms currently displayed and the timestamp associated with each listed alarm.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to infer alarm meanings from the displayed alarm list alone.
Do not use this procedure to determine corrective actions from this source section alone.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Access the Operator Station HMI Visu_Alarm screen and review the displayed tipper alarms and timestamps.

safety_notes: This source supports screen-based alarm viewing only.
Do not infer alarm meanings or corrective actions from this source section alone.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Operator Station HMI

access_required: Access to the Operator Station HMI
system_preconditions: The Operator Station HMI is available for use.
The Visu_Alarm screen can be accessed from the Operator Station HMI.

external_references.description: Operator station display controls reference showing that F6 maps to Visu_Alarm and that the Next Screen drop-down and right-side buttons navigate between HMI screens.

visual_references.description: Operator Station HMI VISU_ALARM view showing tipper alarms and timestamps.
Operator station display controls showing navigation to HMI screens, including F6 for Visu_Alarm.

steps.title: Access the Visu_Alarm screen
steps.purpose: Open the Operator Station HMI screen used to view tipper alarms and timestamps.
steps.instruction: Access the Operator Station HMI Visu_Alarm screen. If using the operator station display controls reference, use the screen navigation controls associated with Visu_Alarm.
steps.expected_result: The Visu_Alarm screen is displayed on the Operator Station HMI.
steps.healthy_condition: The Operator Station HMI shows the VISU_ALARM view.
steps.failure_condition: The Visu_Alarm screen cannot be accessed or the expected alarm screen is not displayed.

actions.label: Open Visu_Alarm screen
actions.exact_action: Access the Operator Station HMI Visu_Alarm screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Screen-navigation controls and the mapping showing F6 to Visu_Alarm.
The VISU_ALARM screen layout used for viewing tipper alarms.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop and escalate if the Visu_Alarm screen cannot be accessed.
Stop and escalate if the displayed screen does not match the documented alarm screen.

source_evidence.text: Access the Operator Station HMI Visu_Alarm screen.
The listed control mapping includes F6 to "Visu_Alarm."

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Visu_Alarm" screen displays a list of all tipper alarms along with a timestamp.

steps.title: Observe the displayed tipper alarm list
steps.purpose: Confirm that the Visu_Alarm screen is presenting the alarm list intended for review.
steps.instruction: Observe the list of tipper alarms displayed on the Visu_Alarm screen.
steps.expected_result: A list of tipper alarms is visible on the screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen displays a list of tipper alarms.
steps.failure_condition: No alarm list is shown, or the screen does not display the documented tipper alarm list.

actions.label: Review alarm list
actions.exact_action: Observe the list of tipper alarms displayed on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The alarm list area showing the tipper alarms displayed on the VISU_ALARM screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop and escalate if the Visu_Alarm screen does not display the documented alarm list.

source_evidence.text: Observe the list of tipper alarms displayed on the screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Visu_Alarm" screen displays a list of all tipper alarms along with a timestamp.

steps.title: Check for timestamps on each listed alarm
steps.purpose: Verify that the displayed alarm entries include timestamp information.
steps.instruction: Check that each listed alarm includes a timestamp.
steps.expected_result: Each displayed alarm entry includes timestamp information.
steps.healthy_condition: Alarm entries are shown with associated timestamps.
steps.failure_condition: Timestamp information is missing from the displayed alarm entries.

actions.label: Verify timestamps
actions.exact_action: Check that each listed alarm includes a timestamp.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Alarm entries and the associated timestamp information shown with each alarm.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop and escalate if the screen does not display timestamp information with the alarm list.

source_evidence.text: Check that each listed alarm includes a timestamp.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Visu_Alarm" screen displays a list of all tipper alarms along with a timestamp.

steps.title: Use the displayed list to identify shown alarms
steps.purpose: Use the visible alarm list and timestamps to identify which alarms are currently shown on the screen.
steps.instruction: Use the displayed alarm list and timestamps to identify the alarms currently shown on the screen.
steps.expected_result: The operator can identify the alarms currently shown and see the timestamp associated with each listed alarm.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed alarm list and timestamps are readable and usable for identifying the alarms shown.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed information is unavailable, unreadable, or insufficient to identify the alarms shown on the screen.

actions.label: Identify displayed alarms
actions.exact_action: Use the displayed alarm list and timestamps to identify the alarms currently shown on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The full VISU_ALARM screen showing the alarm list and timestamps used to identify the alarms currently displayed.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop and escalate if the Visu_Alarm screen cannot be accessed or does not display the documented alarm list and timestamp information.

source_evidence.text: Use the displayed alarm list and timestamps to identify the alarms currently shown on the screen.
The user can view the tipper alarms shown on the Visu_Alarm screen and see the timestamp associated with each listed alarm.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Visu_Alarm" screen displays a list of all tipper alarms along with a timestamp.

success_criteria: The Operator Station HMI Visu_Alarm screen is accessible.
The screen displays a list of tipper alarms.
The displayed alarm entries include timestamps.
The operator can identify the alarms currently shown on the screen using the displayed list and timestamps.
healthy_conditions: The VISU_ALARM screen is displayed on the Operator Station HMI.
A list of tipper alarms is visible.
Each displayed alarm includes timestamp information.
failure_conditions: The Visu_Alarm screen cannot be accessed.
The screen does not display the documented alarm list.
Timestamp information is not shown with the displayed alarms.
The source section does not provide alarm meanings or corrective actions.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the Visu_Alarm screen cannot be accessed.
Escalate if the screen does not display the documented alarm list and timestamp information.
Escalate to a higher support level or SME if alarm interpretation or corrective action is required, because this source section does not provide those details.
